revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Ryō no Gige]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]
'''令義解'''('''りょうのぎげ''')とは、833年に淳和天皇の勅によって[[右大臣]]であった清原夏野によって撰集した[[令]]の解説書。この書物によって、大宝令・養老令が伝えられている。

revision.comment: Auto-generated page using script written by Immanuelle, either as a placeholder redirect or to make bots recognize the page as made by Immanuelle
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Ryō_no_Gige]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

'''令義解'''('''りょうのぎげ''')とは、[[833年]]（[[天長]]10年）に[[淳和天皇]]の勅によって[[右大臣]][[清原夏野]]・[[文章博士]][[菅原清公]]ら12人によって撰集された[[令]]の解説書。全10巻。この書物によって、[[大宝律令|大宝令]]・[[養老律令|養老令]]が伝えられている。
{{History-stub}}

'''令義解'''('''りょうのぎげ''')とは、[[833年]]（[[天長]]10年）に[[淳和天皇]]の勅により[[右大臣]][[清原夏野]]を総裁として、[[文章博士]][[菅原清公]]ら12人によって撰集された[[令]]の解説書。全10巻。この書物によって、[[大宝律令|大宝令]]·[[養老律令|養老令]]が伝えられている。
同じく養老令の注釈書である[[令集解]]（私撰）と違って、こちらには法的効力がある。 {{Japanese-history-stub|りようのきけ}} [[Category:法制史|りょうきのけ]]

同じく養老令の注釈書である[[令集解]]（私撰）と違って、こちらには法的効力がある。 {{Japanese-history-stub|りようのきけ}} [[Category:法制史|りょうきのけ]] [[Category:日本の律令制|りょうきのけ]]

{{DEFAULTSORT:りようのきけ}} [[Category:日本の法制史]] [[Category:日本の律令制]] {{Japanese-history-stub}}

『'''令義解'''』（りょうのぎげ）とは、{{和暦|833}}に[[淳和天皇]]の勅により右大臣[[清原夏野]]を総裁として、文章博士[[菅原清公]]ら12人によって撰集された[[令]]の解説書。全10巻。この書物によって、[[大宝律令|大宝令]]・[[養老律令|養老令]]が伝えられている。
同じく養老令の注釈書である『[[令集解]]』（[[惟宗直本]]の私撰）と違って、こちらには法的効力がある。
30篇のうち21篇が伝わる。令集解から7篇を抽出でき、残る2篇も近世以来逸文が収集されている。従って、国史大系本も含め、現在手にすることのできる本は、取り集め本であることを認識した上で利用しなければならない。
体裁は令本文を大字で掲げ、義解を語句の間に細字双行で加える。

『'''令義解'''』（りょうのぎげ）とは、[[833年]]（天長10年）に[[淳和天皇]]の勅により右大臣[[清原夏野]]を総裁として、文章博士[[菅原清公]]ら12人によって撰集された[[令]]の解説書。全10巻。この書物によって、[[大宝律令|大宝令]]・[[養老律令|養老令]]が伝えられている。
同じく養老令の注釈書である『[[令集解]]』（[[惟宗直本]]の私撰注釈書）と違って、こちらには法的効力（官撰注釈書）がある。
30篇のうち21篇が伝わる。令集解から7篇を抽出でき、残る2篇も近世以来逸文が収集されている。従って、国史大系本も含め、現在手にすることのできる本は、取り集め本であることを認識した上で利用しなければならない。
体裁は令本文を大字で掲げ、義解を語句の間に細字双行で加える。

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[it:Ryō no Gige]][[ja:令義解]][[ko:영의해]]
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11378320]]
Wikidata name: (none)
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:58, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
{{Nihon no hō}}
'''Ryō no Gige''' (令義解) is an interpretive text of the {{ill|Yōrō Code|ja|養老令|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōrō Code|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 養老律令|1=Yōrō Code|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2575743}}, created to establish precise guidelines<ref name=":0">{{Cite book|和書|title=令義解 凡例|year=1939|publisher=新訂増補 国史大系 第22巻|page=1|author=黒板|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/3431635/1/108}}</ref>. It was compiled in 833 CE ([[:en:Tenchō|Tenchō]] 10) under an imperial edict from Emperor Junna, with the right minister {{ill|Kiyohara no Natsuno|ja|清原夏野|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyohara no Natsuno|qq=|1=Kiyohara no Natsuno|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11560500}} serving as chief editor. The compilation involved 12 notable scholars, including [[:en:Sugawara no Kiyotomo|Sugawara no Kiyotomo]], {{ill|Sanuki no Emanari|ja|讃岐永直|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanuki no Emanari|qq=|1=Sanuki no Naganao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632551}}, and others<ref>{{Cite book|和書|title=令義解序|publisher= |series=新訂増補 国史大系|volume=第22|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/3431635/1/118|author=黒板}}</ref>. The work originally comprised 30 articles across 10 volumes<ref name=":0" />, but only 21 articles remain extant. Seven of these can be extracted from the {{ill|Ryōshū Gige|ja|令集解|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryōshū Gige|qq=|1=Ryōshūge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11378321}}, and additional fragments of two articles have been collected since the early modern period. Modern editions, including those from the {{ill|National Historical Series|ja|国史大系|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Historical Series|qq=|1=Kokushi Taikei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10926780}}, incorporate these reconstructed texts.

Since the {{ill|Yōrō Code|ja|養老令|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōrō Code|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 養老律令|1=Yōrō Code|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2575743}} has been lost, the ''Ryō no Gige'' serves as a critical source for the transmission of both the [[:en:Taihō Code|Taihō Code]] and the Yōrō Code<ref name=":0" />. Unlike the ''{{ill|Ryōshū Gige|ja|令集解|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryōshū Gige|qq=|1=Ryōshūge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11378321}}'', a private commentary compiled by {{ill|Wemune Naomoto|ja|惟宗直本|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wemune Naomoto|qq=|1=Koremune no Naomoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11492956}}, the ''Ryō no Gige'' was an officially sanctioned commentary with legal authority.

The structure of the text presents the original law in bold characters, with the interpretive commentary added in smaller, double-spaced text between the lines.

== Compilers ==
* Hanbe no Matsunaga (漢部松長) – {{ill|Daishoi|ja|大初位|1=Senior Initial Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Initial Rank|qq=}} Lower, {{ill|Myōbōtokugyōshō|ja|明法得業生|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōbōtokugyōshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* Kawakare Katsunari (川枯勝成) – {{ill|Jūhachi-i|ja|従八位|1=Junior Eighth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūhachi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Eighth Rank|qq=}} U11er, Minor Official of [[:en:Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|Ministry of Justice]]
* {{ill|Sanuki no Emanari|ja|讃岐永直|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanuki no Emanari|qq=|1=Sanuki no Naganao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632551}} – {{ill|Jūrokui|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūrokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Left Recorder, {{ill|Myōbōhakase|ja|明法博士|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōbōhakase|qq=|1=myōbō hakase|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11512424}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[it:Ryō no Gige]][[ja:令義解]][[ko:영의해]]
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11378320]]
Wikidata name: (none)
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:58, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
{{Nihon no hō}}
'''Ryō no Gige''' (令義解) is an interpretive text of the {{ill|Yōrō Code|ja|養老令|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōrō Code|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 養老律令|1=Yōrō Code|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2575743}}, created to establish precise guidelines<ref name=":0">{{Cite book|和書|title=令義解 凡例|year=1939|publisher=新訂増補 国史大系 第22巻|page=1|author=黒板|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/3431635/1/108}}</ref>. It was compiled in 833 CE ([[:en:Tenchō|Tenchō]] 10) under an imperial edict from Emperor Junna, with the right minister {{ill|Kiyohara no Natsuno|ja|清原夏野|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyohara no Natsuno|qq=|1=Kiyohara no Natsuno|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11560500}} serving as chief editor. The compilation involved 12 notable scholars, including [[:en:Sugawara no Kiyotomo|Sugawara no Kiyotomo]], {{ill|Sanuki no Emanari|ja|讃岐永直|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanuki no Emanari|qq=|1=Sanuki no Naganao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632551}}, and others<ref>{{Cite book|和書|title=令義解序|publisher= |series=新訂増補 国史大系|volume=第22|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/3431635/1/118|author=黒板}}</ref>. The work originally comprised 30 articles across 10 volumes<ref name=":0" />, but only 21 articles remain extant. Seven of these can be extracted from the {{ill|Ryōshū Gige|ja|令集解|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryōshū Gige|qq=|1=Ryōshūge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11378321}}, and additional fragments of two articles have been collected since the early modern period. Modern editions, including those from the {{ill|National Historical Series|ja|国史大系|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Historical Series|qq=|1=Kokushi Taikei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10926780}}, incorporate these reconstructed texts.

Since the {{ill|Yōrō Code|ja|養老令|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōrō Code|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 養老律令|1=Yōrō Code|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2575743}} has been lost, the ''Ryō no Gige'' serves as a critical source for the transmission of both the [[:en:Taihō Code|Taihō Code]] and the Yōrō Code<ref name=":0" />. Unlike the ''{{ill|Ryōshū Gige|ja|令集解|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryōshū Gige|qq=|1=Ryōshūge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11378321}}'', a private commentary compiled by {{ill|Wemune Naomoto|ja|惟宗直本|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wemune Naomoto|qq=|1=Koremune no Naomoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11492956}}, the ''Ryō no Gige'' was an officially sanctioned commentary with legal authority.

The structure of the text presents the original law in bold characters, with the interpretive commentary added in smaller, double-spaced text between the lines.

== Compilers ==

* {{ill|Sanuki no Emanari|ja|讃岐永直|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanuki no Emanari|qq=|1=Sanuki no Naganao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632551}} – {{ill|Jūrokui|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūrokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Left Recorder, {{ill|Myōbōhakase|ja|明法博士|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōbōhakase|qq=|1=myōbō hakase|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11512424}}
* [[:en:Ono no Takamura|Ono no Takamura]] – {{ill|Jūgoin|ja|従五位|1=Junior Fifth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūgoin|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Minor Governor of [[:en:Dazaifu (government)|Dazaifu]]
* Zendo no Masada (善道真貞) – {{ill|Shōgoi|ja|正五位|1=Senior Fifth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Governor of [[:en:Awa Province (Tokushima)|Awa Province]]
* Okiwara Toshihisa (興原敏久) – {{ill|Shōgoi|ja|正五位|1=Senior Fifth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} U11er, Senior Judge of [[:en:Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|Ministry of Justice]]

* [[:en:Sugawara no Kiyotomo|Sugawara no Kiyokimi]] – {{ill|Shōshii|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, {{ill|Left Kyoto District Governor|ja|左京大夫|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Kyoto District Governor|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 京職|1=Right Capital Ward Officer|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11374719}}
* [[:en:Fujiwara no Tsunetsugu|Fujiwara no Tsunatsugu]] – {{ill|Jūshii|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, [[:en:Sangi (Japan)|Sangi]]
* Minabuchi no Hirozane (南淵弘貞) – {{ill|Jūsanmi|ja|従三位|1=Junior Third Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Third Rank|qq=}}, Councilor
* {{ill|Kiyohara no Natsuno|ja|清原夏野|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyohara no Natsuno|qq=|1=Kiyohara no Natsuno|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11560500}} – {{ill|Shōsanmi|ja|正三位|1=Senior Third Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Third Rank|qq=}}, [[:en:Minister of the Right|Udaijin]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[it:Ryō no Gige]][[ja:令義解]][[ko:영의해]]
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11378320]]
Wikidata name: (none)
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:58, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
{{Nihon no hō}}
'''Ryō no Gige''' (令義解) is an interpretive text of the {{ill|Yōrō Code|ja|養老令|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōrō Code|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 養老律令|1=Yōrō Code|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2575743}}, created to establish precise guidelines<ref name=":0">{{Cite book|和書|title=令義解 凡例|year=1939|publisher=新訂増補 国史大系 第22巻|page=1|author=黒板|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/3431635/1/108}}</ref>. It was compiled in 833 CE ([[:en:Tenchō|Tenchō]] 10) under an imperial edict from Emperor Junna, with the right minister {{ill|Kiyohara no Natsuno|ja|清原夏野|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyohara no Natsuno|1=Kiyohara no Natsuno|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11560500}} serving as chief editor. The compilation involved 12 notable scholars, including [[:en:Sugawara no Kiyotomo|Sugawara no Kiyotomo]], {{ill|Sanuki no Emanari|ja|讃岐永直|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanuki no Emanari|1=Sanuki no Naganao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632551}}, and others<ref>{{Cite book|和書|title=令義解序|publisher= |series=新訂増補 国史大系|volume=第22|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/3431635/1/118|author=黒板}}</ref>. The work originally comprised 30 articles across 10 volumes<ref name=":0" />, but only 21 articles remain extant. Seven of these can be extracted from the {{ill|Ryōshū Gige|ja|令集解|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryōshū Gige|1=Ryōshūge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11378321}}, and additional fragments of two articles have been collected since the early modern period. Modern editions, including those from the {{ill|National Historical Series|ja|国史大系|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Historical Series|1=Kokushi Taikei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10926780}}, incorporate these reconstructed texts.

Since the {{ill|Yōrō Code|ja|養老令|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōrō Code|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 養老律令|1=Yōrō Code|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2575743}} has been lost, the ''Ryō no Gige'' serves as a critical source for the transmission of both the [[:en:Taihō Code|Taihō Code]] and the Yōrō Code<ref name=":0" />. Unlike the ''{{ill|Ryōshū Gige|ja|令集解|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryōshū Gige|1=Ryōshūge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11378321}}'', a private commentary compiled by {{ill|Wemune Naomoto|ja|惟宗直本|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wemune Naomoto|1=Koremune no Naomoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11492956}}, the ''Ryō no Gige'' was an officially sanctioned commentary with legal authority.

The structure of the text presents the original law in bold characters, with the interpretive commentary added in smaller, double-spaced text between the lines.

== Compilers ==
* Hanbe no Matsunaga (漢部松長) – {{ill|Daishoi|ja|大初位|1=Senior Initial Rank|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Initial Rank|qq=}} Lower, {{ill|Myōbōtokugyōshō|ja|明法得業生|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōbōtokugyōshō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* Kawakare Katsunari (川枯勝成) – {{ill|Jūhachi-i|ja|従八位|1=Junior Eighth Rank|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūhachi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Eighth Rank|qq=}} U11er, Minor Official of [[:en:Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|Ministry of Justice]]
* {{ill|Sanuki no Emanari|ja|讃岐永直|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanuki no Emanari|1=Sanuki no Naganao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632551}} – {{ill|Jūrokui|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūrokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Left Recorder, {{ill|Myōbōhakase|ja|明法博士|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōbōhakase|1=myōbō hakase|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11512424}}
* [[:en:Ono no Takamura|Ono no Takamura]] – {{ill|Jūgoin|ja|従五位|1=Junior Fifth Rank|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūgoin|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Minor Governor of [[:en:Dazaifu (government)|Dazaifu]]
* Zendo no Masada (善道真貞) – {{ill|Shōgoi|ja|正五位|1=Senior Fifth Rank|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Governor of [[:en:Awa Province (Tokushima)|Awa Province]]
* Okiwara Toshihisa (興原敏久) – {{ill|Shōgoi|ja|正五位|1=Senior Fifth Rank|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} U11er, Senior Judge of [[:en:Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|Ministry of Justice]]
* Fujiwara no Mamoru (藤原衛) – {{ill|Jūshii|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Vice Minister of [[:en:Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|Ministry of Justice]]

* [[:en:Sugawara no Kiyotomo|Sugawara no Kiyokimi]] – {{ill|Shōshii|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, {{ill|Left Kyoto District Governor|ja|左京大夫|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Kyoto District Governor|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 京職|1=Right Capital Ward Officer|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11374719}}
* [[:en:Fujiwara no Tsunetsugu|Fujiwara no Tsunatsugu]] – {{ill|Jūshii|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, [[:en:Sangi (Japan)|Sangi]]
* Minabuchi no Hirozane (南淵弘貞) – {{ill|Jūsanmi|ja|従三位|1=Junior Third Rank|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Third Rank|qq=}}, Councilor
* {{ill|Kiyohara no Natsuno|ja|清原夏野|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyohara no Natsuno|1=Kiyohara no Natsuno|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11560500}} – {{ill|Shōsanmi|ja|正三位|1=Senior Third Rank|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Third Rank|qq=}}, [[:en:Minister of the Right|Udaijin]]

* [[:en:Sugawara no Kiyotomo|Sugawara no Kiyokimi]] – {{ill|Shōshii|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, {{ill|Left Kyoto District Governor|ja|左京大夫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Kyoto District Governor|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 京職|1=Right Capital Ward Officer|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11374719}}

<!--Ryō no Gige--><!--Ryō no Gige--><!--Ryō no Gige--><!--Ryō no Gige--><!--Ryō no Gige--><!--Ryō no Gige-->

[[it:Ryō no Gige]]
[[ko:영의해]]

revision.comment: Bot: Add Wikidata no short description - based on Wikidata English short description
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[it:Ryō no Gige]][[ja:令義解]][[ko:영의해]]
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11378320]]
Wikidata name: (none)
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:58, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
{{Nihon no hō}}
'''Ryō no Gige''' (令義解) is an interpretive text of the {{ill|Yōrō Code|ja|養老令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōrō Code|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 養老律令|1=Yōrō Code|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2575743}}, created to establish precise guidelines<ref name=":0">{{Cite book|和書|title=令義解 凡例|year=1939|publisher=新訂増補 国史大系 第22巻|page=1|author=黒板|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/3431635/1/108}}</ref>. It was compiled in 833 CE ([[:en:Tenchō|Tenchō]] 10) under an imperial edict from Emperor Junna, with the right minister {{ill|Kiyohara no Natsuno|ja|清原夏野|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyohara no Natsuno|1=Kiyohara no Natsuno|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11560500}} serving as chief editor. The compilation involved 12 notable scholars, including [[:en:Sugawara no Kiyotomo|Sugawara no Kiyotomo]], {{ill|Sanuki no Emanari|ja|讃岐永直|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanuki no Emanari|1=Sanuki no Naganao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632551}}, and others<ref>{{Cite book|和書|title=令義解序|publisher= |series=新訂増補 国史大系|volume=第22|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/3431635/1/118|author=黒板}}</ref>. The work originally comprised 30 articles across 10 volumes<ref name=":0" />, but only 21 articles remain extant. Seven of these can be extracted from the {{ill|Ryōshū Gige|ja|令集解|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryōshū Gige|1=Ryōshūge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11378321}}, and additional fragments of two articles have been collected since the early modern period. Modern editions, including those from the {{ill|National Historical Series|ja|国史大系|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Historical Series|1=Kokushi Taikei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10926780}}, incorporate these reconstructed texts.

Since the {{ill|Yōrō Code|ja|養老令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōrō Code|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 養老律令|1=Yōrō Code|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2575743}} has been lost, the ''Ryō no Gige'' serves as a critical source for the transmission of both the [[:en:Taihō Code|Taihō Code]] and the Yōrō Code<ref name=":0" />. Unlike the ''{{ill|Ryōshū Gige|ja|令集解|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryōshū Gige|1=Ryōshūge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11378321}}'', a private commentary compiled by {{ill|Wemune Naomoto|ja|惟宗直本|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wemune Naomoto|1=Koremune no Naomoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11492956}}, the ''Ryō no Gige'' was an officially sanctioned commentary with legal authority.

The structure of the text presents the original law in bold characters, with the interpretive commentary added in smaller, double-spaced text between the lines.

== Compilers ==
* Hanbe no Matsunaga (漢部松長) – {{ill|Daishoi|ja|大初位|1=Senior Initial Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Initial Rank|qq=}} Lower, {{ill|Myōbōtokugyōshō|ja|明法得業生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōbōtokugyōshō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* Kawakare Katsunari (川枯勝成) – {{ill|Jūhachi-i|ja|従八位|1=Junior Eighth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūhachi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Eighth Rank|qq=}} U11er, Minor Official of [[:en:Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|Ministry of Justice]]
* {{ill|Sanuki no Emanari|ja|讃岐永直|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanuki no Emanari|1=Sanuki no Naganao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632551}} – {{ill|Jūrokui|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūrokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Left Recorder, {{ill|Myōbōhakase|ja|明法博士|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōbōhakase|1=myōbō hakase|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11512424}}
* [[:en:Ono no Takamura|Ono no Takamura]] – {{ill|Jūgoin|ja|従五位|1=Junior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūgoin|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Minor Governor of [[:en:Dazaifu (government)|Dazaifu]]
* Zendo no Masada (善道真貞) – {{ill|Shōgoi|ja|正五位|1=Senior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Governor of [[:en:Awa Province (Tokushima)|Awa Province]]
* Okiwara Toshihisa (興原敏久) – {{ill|Shōgoi|ja|正五位|1=Senior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} U11er, Senior Judge of [[:en:Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|Ministry of Justice]]
* Fujiwara no Mamoru (藤原衛) – {{ill|Jūshii|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Vice Minister of [[:en:Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|Ministry of Justice]]
* Fujiwara no Uton (藤原雄敏) – {{ill|Jūshii|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Senior Official of {{ill|Kageyushō|ja|勘解由使|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kageyushō|1=Kageyushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10901369}}
* [[:en:Sugawara no Kiyotomo|Sugawara no Kiyokimi]] – {{ill|Shōshii|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, {{ill|Left Kyoto District Governor|ja|左京大夫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Kyoto District Governor|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 京職|1=Right Capital Ward Officer|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11374719}}
* [[:en:Fujiwara no Tsunetsugu|Fujiwara no Tsunatsugu]] – {{ill|Jūshii|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, [[:en:Sangi (Japan)|Sangi]]
* Minabuchi no Hirozane (南淵弘貞) – {{ill|Jūsanmi|ja|従三位|1=Junior Third Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Third Rank|qq=}}, Councilor
* {{ill|Kiyohara no Natsuno|ja|清原夏野|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyohara no Natsuno|1=Kiyohara no Natsuno|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11560500}} – {{ill|Shōsanmi|ja|正三位|1=Senior Third Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Third Rank|qq=}}, [[:en:Minister of the Right|Udaijin]]

== Editions ==

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[it:Ryō no Gige]][[ja:令義解]][[ko:영의해]]
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11378320]]
Wikidata name: (none)
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:58, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
{{Nihon no hō}}
'''Ryō no Gige''' (令義解) is an interpretive text of the {{ill|Yōrō Code|ja|養老令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōrō Code|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 養老律令|1=Yōrō Code|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2575743}}, created to establish precise guidelines<ref name=":0">{{Cite book|和書|title=令義解 凡例|year=1939|publisher=新訂増補 国史大系 第22巻|page=1|author=黒板|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/3431635/1/108}}</ref>. It was compiled in 833 CE ([[:en:Tenchō|Tenchō]] 10) under an imperial edict from Emperor Junna, with the right minister {{ill|Kiyohara no Natsuno|ja|清原夏野|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyohara no Natsuno|1=Kiyohara no Natsuno|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11560500}} serving as chief editor. The compilation involved 12 notable scholars, including [[:en:Sugawara no Kiyotomo|Sugawara no Kiyotomo]], {{ill|Sanuki no Emanari|ja|讃岐永直|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanuki no Emanari|1=Sanuki no Naganao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632551}}, and others<ref>{{Cite book|和書|title=令義解序|publisher= |series=新訂増補 国史大系|volume=第22|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/3431635/1/118|author=黒板}}</ref>. The work originally comprised 30 articles across 10 volumes<ref name=":0" />, but only 21 articles remain extant. Seven of these can be extracted from the {{ill|Ryōshū Gige|ja|令集解|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryōshū Gige|1=Ryōshūge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11378321}}, and additional fragments of two articles have been collected since the early modern period. Modern editions, including those from the {{ill|National Historical Series|ja|国史大系|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Historical Series|1=Kokushi Taikei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10926780}}, incorporate these reconstructed texts.

Since the {{ill|Yōrō Code|ja|養老令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōrō Code|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 養老律令|1=Yōrō Code|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2575743}} has been lost, the ''Ryō no Gige'' serves as a critical source for the transmission of both the [[:en:Taihō Code|Taihō Code]] and the Yōrō Code<ref name=":0" />. Unlike the ''{{ill|Ryōshū Gige|ja|令集解|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryōshū Gige|1=Ryōshūge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11378321}}'', a private commentary compiled by {{ill|Wemune Naomoto|ja|惟宗直本|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wemune Naomoto|1=Koremune no Naomoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11492956}}, the ''Ryō no Gige'' was an officially sanctioned commentary with legal authority.

The structure of the text presents the original law in bold characters, with the interpretive commentary added in smaller, double-spaced text between the lines.

== Compilers ==
* Hanbe no Matsunaga (漢部松長) – {{ill|Daishoi|ja|大初位|1=Senior Initial Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Initial Rank|qq=}} Lower, {{ill|Myōbōtokugyōshō|ja|明法得業生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōbōtokugyōshō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* Kawakare Katsunari (川枯勝成) – {{ill|Jūhachi-i|ja|従八位|1=Junior Eighth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūhachi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Eighth Rank|qq=}} U11er, Minor Official of [[:en:Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|Ministry of Justice]]
* {{ill|Sanuki no Emanari|ja|讃岐永直|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanuki no Emanari|1=Sanuki no Naganao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632551}} – {{ill|Jūrokui|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūrokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Left Recorder, {{ill|Myōbōhakase|ja|明法博士|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōbōhakase|1=myōbō hakase|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11512424}}
* [[:en:Ono no Takamura|Ono no Takamura]] – {{ill|Jūgoin|ja|従五位|1=Junior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūgoin|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Minor Governor of [[:en:Dazaifu (government)|Dazaifu]]
* Zendo no Masada (善道真貞) – {{ill|Shōgoi|ja|正五位|1=Senior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Governor of [[:en:Awa Province (Tokushima)|Awa Province]]
* Okiwara Toshihisa (興原敏久) – {{ill|Shōgoi|ja|正五位|1=Senior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} U11er, Senior Judge of [[:en:Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|Ministry of Justice]]
* Fujiwara no Mamoru (藤原衛) – {{ill|Jūshii|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Vice Minister of [[:en:Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|Ministry of Justice]]
* Fujiwara no Uton (藤原雄敏) – {{ill|Jūshii|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Senior Official of {{ill|Kageyushō|ja|勘解由使|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kageyushō|1=Kageyushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10901369}}
* [[:en:Sugawara no Kiyotomo|Sugawara no Kiyokimi]] – {{ill|Shōshii|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, {{ill|Left Kyoto District Governor|ja|左京大夫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Kyoto District Governor|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 京職|1=Right Capital Ward Officer|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11374719}}
* [[:en:Fujiwara no Tsunetsugu|Fujiwara no Tsunatsugu]] – {{ill|Jūshii|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, [[:en:Sangi (Japan)|Sangi]]
* Minabuchi no Hirozane (南淵弘貞) – {{ill|Jūsanmi|ja|従三位|1=Junior Third Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Third Rank|qq=}}, Councilor
* {{ill|Kiyohara no Natsuno|ja|清原夏野|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyohara no Natsuno|1=Kiyohara no Natsuno|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11560500}} – {{ill|Shōsanmi|ja|正三位|1=Senior Third Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Third Rank|qq=}}, [[:en:Minister of the Right|Udaijin]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[it:Ryō no Gige]][[ja:令義解]][[ko:영의해]]
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11378320]]
Wikidata name: (none)
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:58, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
{{Nihon no hō}}
'''Ryō no Gige''' (令義解) is an interpretive text of the {{ill|Yōrō Code|ja|養老令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōrō Code|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 養老律令|1=Yōrō Code|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2575743}}, created to establish precise guidelines<ref name=":0">{{Cite book|和書|title=令義解 凡例|year=1939|publisher=新訂増補 国史大系 第22巻|page=1|author=黒板|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/3431635/1/108}}</ref>. It was compiled in 833 CE ([[:en:Tenchō|Tenchō]] 10) under an imperial edict from Emperor Junna, with the right minister {{ill|Kiyohara no Natsuno|ja|清原夏野|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyohara no Natsuno|1=Kiyohara no Natsuno|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11560500}} serving as chief editor. The compilation involved 12 notable scholars, including [[:en:Sugawara no Kiyotomo|Sugawara no Kiyotomo]], {{ill|Sanuki no Emanari|ja|讃岐永直|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanuki no Emanari|1=Sanuki no Naganao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632551}}, and others<ref>{{Cite book|和書|title=令義解序|publisher= |series=新訂増補 国史大系|volume=第22|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/3431635/1/118|author=黒板}}</ref>. The work originally comprised 30 articles across 10 volumes<ref name=":0" />, but only 21 articles remain extant. Seven of these can be extracted from the {{ill|Ryōshū Gige|ja|令集解|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryōshū Gige|1=Ryōshūge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11378321}}, and additional fragments of two articles have been collected since the early modern period. Modern editions, including those from the {{ill|National Historical Series|ja|国史大系|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Historical Series|1=Kokushi Taikei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10926780}}, incorporate these reconstructed texts.

Since the {{ill|Yōrō Code|ja|養老令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōrō Code|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 養老律令|1=Yōrō Code|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2575743}} has been lost, the ''Ryō no Gige'' serves as a critical source for the transmission of both the [[:en:Taihō Code|Taihō Code]] and the Yōrō Code<ref name=":0" />. Unlike the ''{{ill|Ryōshū Gige|ja|令集解|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryōshū Gige|1=Ryōshūge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11378321}}'', a private commentary compiled by {{ill|Wemune Naomoto|ja|惟宗直本|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wemune Naomoto|1=Koremune no Naomoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11492956}}, the ''Ryō no Gige'' was an officially sanctioned commentary with legal authority.

The structure of the text presents the original law in bold characters, with the interpretive commentary added in smaller, double-spaced text between the lines.

== Compilers ==
* Hanbe no Matsunaga (漢部松長) – {{ill|Daishoi|ja|大初位|1=Senior Initial Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Initial Rank|qq=}} Lower, {{ill|Myōbōtokugyōshō|ja|明法得業生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōbōtokugyōshō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* Kawakare Katsunari (川枯勝成) – {{ill|Jūhachi-i|ja|従八位|1=Junior Eighth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūhachi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Eighth Rank|qq=}} U11er, Minor Official of [[:en:Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|Ministry of Justice]]
* {{ill|Sanuki no Emanari|ja|讃岐永直|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanuki no Emanari|1=Sanuki no Naganao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632551}} – {{ill|Jūrokui|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūrokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Left Recorder, {{ill|Myōbōhakase|ja|明法博士|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōbōhakase|1=myōbō hakase|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11512424}}
* [[:en:Ono no Takamura|Ono no Takamura]] – {{ill|Jūgoin|ja|従五位|1=Junior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūgoin|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Minor Governor of [[:en:Dazaifu (government)|Dazaifu]]
* Zendo no Masada (善道真貞) – {{ill|Shōgoi|ja|正五位|1=Senior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Governor of [[:en:Awa Province (Tokushima)|Awa Province]]
* Okiwara Toshihisa (興原敏久) – {{ill|Shōgoi|ja|正五位|1=Senior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} U11er, Senior Judge of [[:en:Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|Ministry of Justice]]
* Fujiwara no Mamoru (藤原衛) – {{ill|Jūshii|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Vice Minister of [[:en:Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|Ministry of Justice]]
* Fujiwara no Uton (藤原雄敏) – {{ill|Jūshii|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Senior Official of {{ill|Kageyushō|ja|勘解由使|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kageyushō|1=Kageyushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10901369}}
* [[:en:Sugawara no Kiyotomo|Sugawara no Kiyokimi]] – {{ill|Shōshii|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, {{ill|Left Kyoto District Governor|ja|左京大夫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Kyoto District Governor|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 京職|1=Right Capital Ward Officer|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11374719}}
* [[:en:Fujiwara no Tsunetsugu|Fujiwara no Tsunatsugu]] – {{ill|Jūshii|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, [[:en:Sangi (Japan)|Sangi]]
* Minabuchi no Hirozane (南淵弘貞) – {{ill|Jūsanmi|ja|従三位|1=Junior Third Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Third Rank|qq=}}, Councilor
* {{ill|Kiyohara no Natsuno|ja|清原夏野|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyohara no Natsuno|1=Kiyohara no Natsuno|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11560500}} – {{ill|Shōsanmi|ja|正三位|1=Senior Third Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Third Rank|qq=}}, [[:en:Minister of the Right|Udaijin]]

[[Category:Wikidata no short description]]
[[Category:Wikidata has English label]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[it:Ryō no Gige]][[ja:令義解]][[ko:영의해]]
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11378320]]
Wikidata name: (none)
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:58, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
{{Nihon no hō}}
'''Ryō no Gige''' (令義解) is an interpretive text of the {{ill|Yōrō Code|ja|養老令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōrō Code|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 養老律令|1=Yōrō Code|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2575743}}, created to establish precise guidelines<ref name=":0">{{Cite book|和書|title=令義解 凡例|year=1939|publisher=新訂増補 国史大系 第22巻|page=1|author=黒板|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/3431635/1/108}}</ref>. It was compiled in 833 CE ([[:en:Tenchō|Tenchō]] 10) under an imperial edict from Emperor Junna, with the right minister {{ill|Kiyohara no Natsuno|ja|清原夏野|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyohara no Natsuno|1=Kiyohara no Natsuno|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11560500}} serving as chief editor. The compilation involved 12 notable scholars, including [[:en:Sugawara no Kiyotomo|Sugawara no Kiyotomo]], {{ill|Sanuki no Emanari|ja|讃岐永直|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanuki no Emanari|1=Sanuki no Naganao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632551}}, and others<ref>{{Cite book|和書|title=令義解序|publisher= |series=新訂増補 国史大系|volume=第22|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/3431635/1/118|author=黒板}}</ref>. The work originally comprised 30 articles across 10 volumes<ref name=":0" />, but only 21 articles remain extant. Seven of these can be extracted from the {{ill|Ryōshū Gige|ja|令集解|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryōshū Gige|1=Ryōshūge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11378321}}, and additional fragments of two articles have been collected since the early modern period. Modern editions, including those from the {{ill|National Historical Series|ja|国史大系|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Historical Series|1=Kokushi Taikei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10926780}}, incorporate these reconstructed texts.

Since the {{ill|Yōrō Code|ja|養老令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōrō Code|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 養老律令|1=Yōrō Code|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2575743}} has been lost, the ''Ryō no Gige'' serves as a critical source for the transmission of both the [[:en:Taihō Code|Taihō Code]] and the Yōrō Code<ref name=":0" />. Unlike the ''{{ill|Ryōshū Gige|ja|令集解|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryōshū Gige|1=Ryōshūge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11378321}}'', a private commentary compiled by {{ill|Wemune Naomoto|ja|惟宗直本|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wemune Naomoto|1=Koremune no Naomoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11492956}}, the ''Ryō no Gige'' was an officially sanctioned commentary with legal authority.

The structure of the text presents the original law in bold characters, with the interpretive commentary added in smaller, double-spaced text between the lines.

== Compilers ==
* Hanbe no Matsunaga (漢部松長) – {{ill|Daishoi|ja|大初位|1=Senior Initial Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Initial Rank|qq=}} Lower, {{ill|Myōbōtokugyōshō|ja|明法得業生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōbōtokugyōshō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* Kawakare Katsunari (川枯勝成) – {{ill|Jūhachi-i|ja|従八位|1=Junior Eighth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūhachi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Eighth Rank|qq=}} U11er, Minor Official of [[:en:Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|Ministry of Justice]]
* {{ill|Sanuki no Emanari|ja|讃岐永直|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanuki no Emanari|1=Sanuki no Naganao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632551}} – {{ill|Jūrokui|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūrokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Left Recorder, {{ill|Myōbōhakase|ja|明法博士|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōbōhakase|1=myōbō hakase|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11512424}}
* [[:en:Ono no Takamura|Ono no Takamura]] – {{ill|Jūgoin|ja|従五位|1=Junior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūgoin|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Minor Governor of [[:en:Dazaifu (government)|Dazaifu]]
* Zendo no Masada (善道真貞) – {{ill|Shōgoi|ja|正五位|1=Senior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Governor of [[:en:Awa Province (Tokushima)|Awa Province]]
* Okiwara Toshihisa (興原敏久) – {{ill|Shōgoi|ja|正五位|1=Senior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} U11er, Senior Judge of [[:en:Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|Ministry of Justice]]
* Fujiwara no Mamoru (藤原衛) – {{ill|Jūshii|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Vice Minister of [[:en:Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|Ministry of Justice]]
* Fujiwara no Uton (藤原雄敏) – {{ill|Jūshii|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Senior Official of {{ill|Kageyushō|ja|勘解由使|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kageyushō|1=Kageyushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10901369}}
* [[:en:Sugawara no Kiyotomo|Sugawara no Kiyokimi]] – {{ill|Shōshii|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, {{ill|Left Kyoto District Governor|ja|左京大夫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Kyoto District Governor|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 京職|1=Right Capital Ward Officer|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11374719}}
* [[:en:Fujiwara no Tsunetsugu|Fujiwara no Tsunatsugu]] – {{ill|Jūshii|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, [[:en:Sangi (Japan)|Sangi]]
* Minabuchi no Hirozane (南淵弘貞) – {{ill|Jūsanmi|ja|従三位|1=Junior Third Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Third Rank|qq=}}, Councilor
* {{ill|Kiyohara no Natsuno|ja|清原夏野|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyohara no Natsuno|1=Kiyohara no Natsuno|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11560500}} – {{ill|Shōsanmi|ja|正三位|1=Senior Third Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Third Rank|qq=}}, [[:en:Minister of the Right|Udaijin]]

*{{Cite book|和書|title=国史大系 第12巻・令義解|publisher={{ill|Keizai Zasshisha|ja|経済雑誌社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keizai Zasshisha|1=Keizai Zasshisha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11606486}}|url={{NDLDC|991102/16}}|year=1900}}

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:58, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
{{Nihon no hō}}
'''Ryō no Gige''' (令義解) is an interpretive text of the {{ill|Yōrō Code|ja|養老令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōrō Code|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 養老律令|1=Yōrō Code|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2575743}}, created to establish precise guidelines<ref name=":0">{{Cite book|和書|title=令義解 凡例|year=1939|publisher=新訂増補 国史大系 第22巻|page=1|author=黒板|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/3431635/1/108}}</ref>. It was compiled in 833 CE ([[:en:Tenchō|Tenchō]] 10) under an imperial edict from Emperor Junna, with the right minister {{ill|Kiyohara no Natsuno|ja|清原夏野|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyohara no Natsuno|1=Kiyohara no Natsuno|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11560500}} serving as chief editor. The compilation involved 12 notable scholars, including [[:en:Sugawara no Kiyotomo|Sugawara no Kiyotomo]], {{ill|Sanuki no Emanari|ja|讃岐永直|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanuki no Emanari|1=Sanuki no Naganao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632551}}, and others<ref>{{Cite book|和書|title=令義解序|publisher= |series=新訂増補 国史大系|volume=第22|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/3431635/1/118|author=黒板}}</ref>. The work originally comprised 30 articles across 10 volumes<ref name=":0" />, but only 21 articles remain extant. Seven of these can be extracted from the {{ill|Ryōshū Gige|ja|令集解|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryōshū Gige|1=Ryōshūge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11378321}}, and additional fragments of two articles have been collected since the early modern period. Modern editions, including those from the {{ill|National Historical Series|ja|国史大系|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Historical Series|1=Kokushi Taikei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10926780}}, incorporate these reconstructed texts.

Since the {{ill|Yōrō Code|ja|養老令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōrō Code|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 養老律令|1=Yōrō Code|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2575743}} has been lost, the ''Ryō no Gige'' serves as a critical source for the transmission of both the [[:en:Taihō Code|Taihō Code]] and the Yōrō Code<ref name=":0" />. Unlike the ''{{ill|Ryōshū Gige|ja|令集解|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryōshū Gige|1=Ryōshūge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11378321}}'', a private commentary compiled by {{ill|Wemune Naomoto|ja|惟宗直本|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wemune Naomoto|1=Koremune no Naomoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11492956}}, the ''Ryō no Gige'' was an officially sanctioned commentary with legal authority.

The structure of the text presents the original law in bold characters, with the interpretive commentary added in smaller, double-spaced text between the lines.

== Compilers ==
* Hanbe no Matsunaga (漢部松長) – {{ill|Daishoi|ja|大初位|1=Senior Initial Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Initial Rank|qq=}} Lower, {{ill|Myōbōtokugyōshō|ja|明法得業生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōbōtokugyōshō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* Kawakare Katsunari (川枯勝成) – {{ill|Jūhachi-i|ja|従八位|1=Junior Eighth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūhachi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Eighth Rank|qq=}} U11er, Minor Official of [[:en:Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|Ministry of Justice]]
* {{ill|Sanuki no Emanari|ja|讃岐永直|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanuki no Emanari|1=Sanuki no Naganao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632551}} – {{ill|Jūrokui|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūrokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Left Recorder, {{ill|Myōbōhakase|ja|明法博士|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōbōhakase|1=myōbō hakase|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11512424}}
* [[:en:Ono no Takamura|Ono no Takamura]] – {{ill|Jūgoin|ja|従五位|1=Junior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūgoin|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Minor Governor of [[:en:Dazaifu (government)|Dazaifu]]
* Zendo no Masada (善道真貞) – {{ill|Shōgoi|ja|正五位|1=Senior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Governor of [[:en:Awa Province (Tokushima)|Awa Province]]
* Okiwara Toshihisa (興原敏久) – {{ill|Shōgoi|ja|正五位|1=Senior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} U11er, Senior Judge of [[:en:Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|Ministry of Justice]]
* Fujiwara no Mamoru (藤原衛) – {{ill|Jūshii|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Vice Minister of [[:en:Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|Ministry of Justice]]
* Fujiwara no Uton (藤原雄敏) – {{ill|Jūshii|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Senior Official of {{ill|Kageyushō|ja|勘解由使|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kageyushō|1=Kageyushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10901369}}
* [[:en:Sugawara no Kiyotomo|Sugawara no Kiyokimi]] – {{ill|Shōshii|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, {{ill|Left Kyoto District Governor|ja|左京大夫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Kyoto District Governor|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 京職|1=Right Capital Ward Officer|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11374719}}
* [[:en:Fujiwara no Tsunetsugu|Fujiwara no Tsunatsugu]] – {{ill|Jūshii|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, [[:en:Sangi (Japan)|Sangi]]
* Minabuchi no Hirozane (南淵弘貞) – {{ill|Jūsanmi|ja|従三位|1=Junior Third Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Third Rank|qq=}}, Councilor
* {{ill|Kiyohara no Natsuno|ja|清原夏野|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyohara no Natsuno|1=Kiyohara no Natsuno|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11560500}} – {{ill|Shōsanmi|ja|正三位|1=Senior Third Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Third Rank|qq=}}, [[:en:Minister of the Right|Udaijin]]

{{Nihon no hō}}
'''Ryō no Gige''' (令義解) is an interpretive text of the {{ill|Yōrō Code|ja|養老令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōrō Code|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 養老律令|1=Yōrō Code|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2575743}}, created to establish precise guidelines<ref name=":0">{{Cite book|和書|title=令義解 凡例|year=1939|publisher=新訂増補 国史大系 第22巻|page=1|author=黒板|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/3431635/1/108}}</ref>. It was compiled in 833 CE ([[:en:Tenchō|Tenchō]] 10) under an imperial edict from Emperor Junna, with the right minister {{ill|Kiyohara no Natsuno|ja|清原夏野|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyohara no Natsuno|1=Kiyohara no Natsuno|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11560500}} serving as chief editor. The compilation involved 12 notable scholars, including [[:en:Sugawara no Kiyotomo|Sugawara no Kiyotomo]], {{ill|Sanuki no Emanari|ja|讃岐永直|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanuki no Emanari|1=Sanuki no Naganao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632551}}, and others<ref>{{Cite book|和書|title=令義解序|publisher= |series=新訂増補 国史大系|volume=第22|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/3431635/1/118|author=黒板}}</ref>. The work originally comprised 30 articles across 10 volumes<ref name=":0" />, but only 21 articles remain extant. Seven of these can be extracted from the {{ill|Ryōshū Gige|ja|令集解|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryōshū Gige|1=Ryōshūge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11378321}}, and additional fragments of two articles have been collected since the early modern period. Modern editions, including those from the {{ill|National Historical Series|ja|国史大系|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Historical Series|1=Kokushi Taikei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10926780}}, incorporate these reconstructed texts.

Since the {{ill|Yōrō Code|ja|養老令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōrō Code|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 養老律令|1=Yōrō Code|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2575743}} has been lost, the ''Ryō no Gige'' serves as a critical source for the transmission of both the [[:en:Taihō Code|Taihō Code]] and the Yōrō Code<ref name=":0" />. Unlike the ''{{ill|Ryōshū Gige|ja|令集解|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryōshū Gige|1=Ryōshūge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11378321}}'', a private commentary compiled by {{ill|Wemune Naomoto|ja|惟宗直本|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wemune Naomoto|1=Koremune no Naomoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11492956}}, the ''Ryō no Gige'' was an officially sanctioned commentary with legal authority.

The structure of the text presents the original law in bold characters, with the interpretive commentary added in smaller, double-spaced text between the lines.

== Compilers ==
* Hanbe no Matsunaga (漢部松長) – {{ill|Daishoi|ja|大初位|1=Senior Initial Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Initial Rank|qq=}} Lower, {{ill|Myōbōtokugyōshō|ja|明法得業生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōbōtokugyōshō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* Kawakare Katsunari (川枯勝成) – {{ill|Jūhachi-i|ja|従八位|1=Junior Eighth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūhachi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Eighth Rank|qq=}} U11er, Minor Official of [[:en:Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|Ministry of Justice]]
* {{ill|Sanuki no Emanari|ja|讃岐永直|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanuki no Emanari|1=Sanuki no Naganao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632551}} – {{ill|Jūrokui|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūrokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Left Recorder, {{ill|Myōbōhakase|ja|明法博士|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōbōhakase|1=myōbō hakase|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11512424}}
* [[:en:Ono no Takamura|Ono no Takamura]] – {{ill|Jūgoin|ja|従五位|1=Junior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūgoin|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Minor Governor of [[:en:Dazaifu (government)|Dazaifu]]
* Zendo no Masada (善道真貞) – {{ill|Shōgoi|ja|正五位|1=Senior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Governor of [[:en:Awa Province (Tokushima)|Awa Province]]
* Okiwara Toshihisa (興原敏久) – {{ill|Shōgoi|ja|正五位|1=Senior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} U11er, Senior Judge of [[:en:Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|Ministry of Justice]]
* Fujiwara no Mamoru (藤原衛) – {{ill|Jūshii|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Vice Minister of [[:en:Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|Ministry of Justice]]
* Fujiwara no Uton (藤原雄敏) – {{ill|Jūshii|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Senior Official of {{ill|Kageyushō|ja|勘解由使|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kageyushō|1=Kageyushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10901369}}
* [[:en:Sugawara no Kiyotomo|Sugawara no Kiyokimi]] – {{ill|Shōshii|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, {{ill|Left Kyoto District Governor|ja|左京大夫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Kyoto District Governor|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 京職|1=Right Capital Ward Officer|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11374719}}
* [[:en:Fujiwara no Tsunetsugu|Fujiwara no Tsunatsugu]] – {{ill|Jūshii|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, [[:en:Sangi (Japan)|Sangi]]
* Minabuchi no Hirozane (南淵弘貞) – {{ill|Jūsanmi|ja|従三位|1=Junior Third Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Third Rank|qq=}}, Councilor
* {{ill|Kiyohara no Natsuno|ja|清原夏野|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyohara no Natsuno|1=Kiyohara no Natsuno|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11560500}} – {{ill|Shōsanmi|ja|正三位|1=Senior Third Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Third Rank|qq=}}, [[:en:Minister of the Right|Udaijin]]

Modern editions, including those from the {{ill|National Historical Series|ja|国史大系|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Historical Series|1=Kokushi Taikei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10926780}}, incorporate these reconstructed texts.
Since the {{ill|Yōrō Code|ja|養老令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōrō Code|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 養老律令|1=Yōrō Code|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2575743}} has been lost, the ''Ryō no Gige'' serves as a critical source for the transmission of both the [[:en:Taihō Code|Taihō Code]] and the Yōrō Code<ref name=":0" />. Unlike the ''{{ill|Ryōshū Gige|ja|令集解|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryōshū Gige|1=Ryōshūge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11378321}}'', a private commentary compiled by {{ill|Wemune Naomoto|ja|惟宗直本|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wemune Naomoto|1=Koremune no Naomoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11492956}}, the ''Ryō no Gige'' was an officially sanctioned commentary with legal authority.
The structure of the text presents the original law in bold characters, with the interpretive commentary added in smaller, double-spaced text between the lines.
== Compilers == * Hanbe no Matsunaga (漢部松長) – {{ill|Daishoi|ja|大初位|1=Senior Initial Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Initial Rank|qq=}} Lower, {{ill|Myōbōtokugyōshō|ja|明法得業生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōbōtokugyōshō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * Kawakare Katsunari (川枯勝成) – {{ill|Jūhachi-i|ja|従八位|1=Junior Eighth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūhachi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Eighth Rank|qq=}} U11er, Minor Official of [[:en:Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|Ministry of Justice]] * {{ill|Sanuki no Emanari|ja|讃岐永直|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanuki no Emanari|1=Sanuki no Naganao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632551}} – {{ill|Jūrokui|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūrokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Left Recorder, {{ill|Myōbōhakase|ja|明法博士|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōbōhakase|1=myōbō hakase|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11512424}} * [[:en:Ono no Takamura|Ono no Takamura]] – {{ill|Jūgoin|ja|従五位|1=Junior Fifth {{ill|Shōgoi|ja|正五位|1=Senior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Governor of [[:en:Awa Province (Tokushima)|Awa Province]] * Okiwara Toshihisa (興原敏久) – {{ill|Shōgoi|ja|正五位|1=Senior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} U11er, Senior Judge of [[:en:Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|Ministry of Justice]] * Fujiwara no Mamoru (藤原衛) – {{ill|Jūshii|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Vice Minister of [[:en:Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|Ministry of Justice]] * Fujiwara no Uton (藤原雄敏) – {{ill|Jūshii|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Senior Official of {{ill|Kageyushō|ja|勘解由使|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kageyushō|1=Kageyushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10901369}} * [[:en:Sugawara no Kiyotomo|Sugawara no Kiyokimi]] – {{ill|Shōshii|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, {{ill|Left Kyoto District (Japan)|Sangi]] * Minabuchi no Hirozane (南淵弘貞) – {{ill|Jūsanmi|ja|従三位|1=Junior Third Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Third Rank|qq=}}, Councilor * {{ill|Kiyohara no Natsuno|ja|清原夏野|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyohara no Natsuno|1=Kiyohara no Natsuno|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11560500}} – {{ill|Shōsanmi|ja|正三位|1=Senior Third <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[it:Ryō no Gige]][[ja:令義解]][[ko:영의해]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[it:Ryō no Gige]][[ja:令義解]][[ko:영의해]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[it:Ryō no Gige]][[ja:令義解]][[ko:영의해]]
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11378320]]
Wikidata name: (none)
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:58, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
{{Nihon no hō}}
'''Ryō no Gige''' (令義解) is an interpretive text of the {{ill|Yōrō Code|ja|養老令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōrō Code|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 養老律令|1=Yōrō Code|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2575743}}, created to establish precise guidelines<ref name=":0">{{Cite book|和書|title=令義解 凡例|year=1939|publisher=新訂増補 国史大系 第22巻|page=1|author=黒板|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/3431635/1/108}}</ref>. It was compiled in 833 CE ({{ill|Tenchō|en|Tenchō|WD=Q1373138|lt=Tenchō}} 10) under an imperial edict from Emperor Junna, with the right minister {{ill|Kiyohara no Natsuno|ja|清原夏野|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyohara no Natsuno|1=Kiyohara no Natsuno|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11560500}} serving as chief editor. The compilation involved 12 notable scholars, including {{ill|Sugawara no Kiyotomo|en|Sugawara no Kiyotomo|WD=Q3503077|lt=Sugawara no Kiyotomo}}, {{ill|Sanuki no Emanari|ja|讃岐永直|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanuki no Emanari|1=Sanuki no Naganao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632551}}, and others<ref>{{Cite book|和書|title=令義解序|publisher= |series=新訂増補 国史大系|volume=第22|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/3431635/1/118|author=黒板}}</ref>. The work originally comprised 30 articles across 10 volumes<ref name=":0" />, but only 21 articles remain extant. Seven of these can be extracted from the {{ill|Ryōshū Gige|ja|令集解|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryōshū Gige|1=Ryōshūge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11378321}}, and additional fragments of two articles have been collected since the early modern period. Modern editions, including those from the {{ill|National Historical Series|ja|国史大系|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Historical Series|1=Kokushi Taikei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10926780}}, incorporate these reconstructed texts.

Since the {{ill|Yōrō Code|ja|養老令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōrō Code|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 養老律令|1=Yōrō Code|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2575743}} has been lost, the ''Ryō no Gige'' serves as a critical source for the transmission of both the {{ill|Taihō Code|en|Taihō Code|WD=Q1059892|lt=Taihō Code}} and the Yōrō Code<ref name=":0" />. Unlike the ''{{ill|Ryōshū Gige|ja|令集解|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryōshū Gige|1=Ryōshūge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11378321}}'', a private commentary compiled by {{ill|Wemune Naomoto|ja|惟宗直本|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wemune Naomoto|1=Koremune no Naomoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11492956}}, the ''Ryō no Gige'' was an officially sanctioned commentary with legal authority.

The structure of the text presents the original law in bold characters, with the interpretive commentary added in smaller, double-spaced text between the lines.

== Compilers ==
* Hanbe no Matsunaga (漢部松長) – {{ill|Daishoi|ja|大初位|1=Senior Initial Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Initial Rank|qq=}} Lower, {{ill|Myōbōtokugyōshō|ja|明法得業生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōbōtokugyōshō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* Kawakare Katsunari (川枯勝成) – {{ill|Jūhachi-i|ja|従八位|1=Junior Eighth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūhachi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Eighth Rank|qq=}} U11er, Minor Official of {{ill|Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|en|Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|WD=Q6867320|lt=Ministry of Justice}}
* {{ill|Sanuki no Emanari|ja|讃岐永直|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanuki no Emanari|1=Sanuki no Naganao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632551}} – {{ill|Jūrokui|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūrokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Left Recorder, {{ill|Myōbōhakase|ja|明法博士|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōbōhakase|1=myōbō hakase|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11512424}}
* {{ill|Ono no Takamura|en|Ono no Takamura|WD=Q1139928|lt=Ono no Takamura}} – {{ill|Jūgoin|ja|従五位|1=Junior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūgoin|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Minor Governor of {{ill|Dazaifu (government)|en|Dazaifu (government)|WD=Q144845|lt=Dazaifu}}
* Zendo no Masada (善道真貞) – {{ill|Shōgoi|ja|正五位|1=Senior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Governor of {{ill|Awa Province (Tokushima)|en|Awa Province (Tokushima)|WD=Q907457|lt=Awa Province}}
* Okiwara Toshihisa (興原敏久) – {{ill|Shōgoi|ja|正五位|1=Senior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} U11er, Senior Judge of {{ill|Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|en|Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|WD=Q6867320|lt=Ministry of Justice}}
* Fujiwara no Mamoru (藤原衛) – {{ill|Jūshii|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Vice Minister of {{ill|Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|en|Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|WD=Q6867320|lt=Ministry of Justice}}
* Fujiwara no Uton (藤原雄敏) – {{ill|Jūshii|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Senior Official of {{ill|Kageyushō|ja|勘解由使|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kageyushō|1=Kageyushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10901369}}
* {{ill|Sugawara no Kiyotomo|en|Sugawara no Kiyotomo|WD=Q3503077|lt=Sugawara no Kiyokimi}} – {{ill|Shōshii|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, {{ill|Left Kyoto District Governor|ja|左京大夫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Kyoto District Governor|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 京職|1=Right Capital Ward Officer|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11374719}}
* {{ill|Fujiwara no Tsunetsugu|en|Fujiwara no Tsunetsugu|WD=Q5507547|lt=Fujiwara no Tsunatsugu}} – {{ill|Jūshii|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, {{ill|Sangi (Japan)|en|Sangi (Japan)|WD=Q1133663|lt=Sangi}}
* Minabuchi no Hirozane (南淵弘貞) – {{ill|Jūsanmi|ja|従三位|1=Junior Third Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Third Rank|qq=}}, Councilor
* {{ill|Kiyohara no Natsuno|ja|清原夏野|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyohara no Natsuno|1=Kiyohara no Natsuno|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11560500}} – {{ill|Shōsanmi|ja|正三位|1=Senior Third Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Third Rank|qq=}}, {{ill|Minister of the Right|en|Minister of the Right|WD=Q1351174|lt=Udaijin}}

Seven of these can be extracted from the {{ill|Ryōshū Gige|ja|令集解|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryōshū Gige|1=Ryōshūge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11378321}}, and additional fragments of two articles have been collected since the early modern period. Modern editions, including those from the {{ill|National Historical Series|ja|国史大系|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Historical Series|1=Kokushi Taikei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10926780}}, incorporate these reconstructed texts.

Since the {{ill|Yōrō Code|ja|養老令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōrō Code|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 養老律令|1=Yōrō Code|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2575743}} has been lost, the ''Ryō no Gige'' serves as a critical source for the transmission of both the {{ill|Taihō Code|en|Taihō Code|WD=Q1059892|lt=Taihō Code}} and the Yōrō Code<ref name=":0" />. Unlike the ''{{ill|Ryōshū Gige|ja|令集解|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryōshū Gige|1=Ryōshūge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11378321}}'', a private commentary compiled by {{ill|Wemune Naomoto|ja|惟宗直本|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wemune Naomoto|1=Koremune no Naomoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11492956}}, the ''Ryō no Gige'' was an officially sanctioned commentary with legal authority.

The structure of the text presents the original law in bold characters, with the interpretive commentary added in smaller, double-spaced text between the lines.

== Compilers ==
* Hanbe no Matsunaga (漢部松長) – {{ill|Daishoi|ja|大初位|1=Senior Initial Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Initial Rank|qq=}} Lower, {{ill|Myōbōtokugyōshō|ja|明法得業生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōbōtokugyōshō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* Kawakare Katsunari (川枯勝成) – {{ill|Jūhachi-i|ja|従八位|1=Junior Eighth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūhachi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Eighth Rank|qq=}} U11er, Minor Official of {{ill|Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|en|Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|WD=Q6867320|lt=Ministry of Justice}}
* {{ill|Sanuki no Emanari|ja|讃岐永直|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanuki no Emanari|1=Sanuki no Naganao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632551}} – {{ill|Jūrokui|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūrokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Left Recorder, {{ill|Myōbōhakase|ja|明法博士|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōbōhakase|1=myōbō hakase|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11512424}}
* {{ill|Ono no Takamura|en|Ono no Takamura|WD=Q1139928|lt=Ono no Takamura}} – {{ill|Jūgoin|ja|従五位|1=Junior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūgoin|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Minor Governor of {{ill|Dazaifu (government)|en|Dazaifu (government)|WD=Q144845|lt=Dazaifu}}
* Zendo no Masada (善道真貞) – {{ill|Shōgoi|ja|正五位|1=Senior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Governor of {{ill|Awa Province (Tokushima)|en|Awa Province (Tokushima)|WD=Q907457|lt=Awa Province}}
* Okiwara Toshihisa (興原敏久) – {{ill|Shōgoi|ja|正五位|1=Senior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} U11er, Senior Judge of {{ill|Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|en|Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|WD=Q6867320|lt=Ministry of Justice}}
* Fujiwara no Mamoru (藤原衛) – {{ill|Jūshii|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Vice Minister of {{ill|Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|en|Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|WD=Q6867320|lt=Ministry of Justice}}
* Fujiwara no Uton (藤原雄敏) – {{ill|Jūshii|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Senior Official of {{ill|Kageyushō|ja|勘解由使|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kageyushō|1=Kageyushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10901369}}
* {{ill|Sugawara no Kiyotomo|en|Sugawara no Kiyotomo|WD=Q3503077|lt=Sugawara no Kiyokimi}} – {{ill|Shōshii|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, {{ill|Left Kyoto District Governor|ja|左京大夫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Kyoto District Governor|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 京職|1=Right Capital Ward Officer|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11374719}}
* {{ill|Fujiwara no Tsunetsugu|en|Fujiwara no Tsunetsugu|WD=Q5507547|lt=Fujiwara no Tsunatsugu}} – {{ill|Jūshii|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, {{ill|Sangi (Japan)|en|Sangi (Japan)|WD=Q1133663|lt=Sangi}}
* Minabuchi no Hirozane (南淵弘貞) – {{ill|Jūsanmi|ja|従三位|1=Junior Third Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Third Rank|qq=}}, Councilor
* {{ill|Kiyohara no Natsuno|ja|清原夏野|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyohara no Natsuno|1=Kiyohara no Natsuno|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11560500}} – {{ill|Shōsanmi|ja|正三位|1=Senior Third Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Third Rank|qq=}}, {{ill|Minister of the Right|en|Minister of the Right|WD=Q1351174|lt=Udaijin}}

{{Nihon no hō}}
'''Ryō no Gige''' (令義解) is an interpretive text of the {{ill|Yōrō Code|ja|養老令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōrō Code|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 養老律令|1=Yōrō Code|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2575743}}, created to establish precise guidelines<ref name=":0">{{Cite book|和書|title=令義解 凡例|year=1939|publisher=新訂増補 国史大系 第22巻|page=1|author=黒板|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/3431635/1/108}}</ref>. It was compiled in 833 CE ({{ill|Tenchō|en|Tenchō|WD=Q1373138|lt=Tenchō}} 10) under an imperial edict from Emperor Junna, with the right minister {{ill|Kiyohara no Natsuno|ja|清原夏野|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyohara no Natsuno|1=Kiyohara no Natsuno|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11560500}} serving as chief editor. The compilation involved 12 notable scholars, including {{ill|Sugawara no Kiyotomo|en|Sugawara no Kiyotomo|WD=Q3503077|lt=Sugawara no Kiyotomo}}, {{ill|Sanuki no Emanari|ja|讃岐永直|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanuki no Emanari|1=Sanuki no Naganao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632551}}, and others<ref>{{Cite book|和書|title=令義解序|publisher= |series=新訂増補 国史大系|volume=第22|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/3431635/1/118|author=黒板}}</ref>. The work originally comprised 30 articles across 10 volumes<ref name=":0" />, but only 21 articles remain extant. Seven of these can be extracted from the {{ill|Ryōshū Gige|ja|令集解|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryōshū Gige|1=Ryōshūge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11378321}}, and additional fragments of two articles have been collected since the early modern period. Modern editions, including those from the {{ill|National Historical Series|ja|国史大系|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Historical Series|1=Kokushi Taikei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10926780}}, incorporate these reconstructed texts.

Since the {{ill|Yōrō Code|ja|養老令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōrō Code|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 養老律令|1=Yōrō Code|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2575743}} has been lost, the ''Ryō no Gige'' serves as a critical source for the transmission of both the {{ill|Taihō Code|en|Taihō Code|WD=Q1059892|lt=Taihō Code}} and the Yōrō Code<ref name=":0" />. Unlike the ''{{ill|Ryōshū Gige|ja|令集解|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryōshū Gige|1=Ryōshūge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11378321}}'', a private commentary compiled by {{ill|Wemune Naomoto|ja|惟宗直本|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wemune Naomoto|1=Koremune no Naomoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11492956}}, the ''Ryō no Gige'' was an officially sanctioned commentary with legal authority.

The structure of the text presents the original law in bold characters, with the interpretive commentary added in smaller, double-spaced text between the lines.

== Compilers ==
* Hanbe no Matsunaga (漢部松長) – {{ill|Daishoi|ja|大初位|1=Senior Initial Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Initial Rank|qq=}} Lower, {{ill|Myōbōtokugyōshō|ja|明法得業生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōbōtokugyōshō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* Kawakare Katsunari (川枯勝成) – {{ill|Jūhachi-i|ja|従八位|1=Junior Eighth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūhachi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Eighth Rank|qq=}} U11er, Minor Official of {{ill|Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|en|Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|WD=Q6867320|lt=Ministry of Justice}}
* {{ill|Sanuki no Emanari|ja|讃岐永直|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanuki no Emanari|1=Sanuki no Naganao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632551}} – {{ill|Jūrokui|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūrokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Left Recorder, {{ill|Myōbōhakase|ja|明法博士|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōbōhakase|1=myōbō hakase|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11512424}}
* {{ill|Ono no Takamura|en|Ono no Takamura|WD=Q1139928|lt=Ono no Takamura}} – {{ill|Jūgoin|ja|従五位|1=Junior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūgoin|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Minor Governor of {{ill|Dazaifu (government)|en|Dazaifu (government)|WD=Q144845|lt=Dazaifu}}

* Okiwara Toshihisa (興原敏久) – {{ill|Shōgoi|ja|正五位|1=Senior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} U11er, Senior Judge of {{ill|Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|en|Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|WD=Q6867320|lt=Ministry of Justice}}
* Fujiwara no Mamoru (藤原衛) – {{ill|Jūshii|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, Vice Minister of {{ill|Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|en|Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|WD=Q6867320|lt=Ministry of Justice}}

* {{ill|Sugawara no Kiyotomo|en|Sugawara no Kiyotomo|WD=Q3503077|lt=Sugawara no Kiyokimi}} – {{ill|Shōshii|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, {{ill|Left Kyoto District Governor|ja|左京大夫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Kyoto District Governor|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 京職|1=Right Capital Ward Officer|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11374719}}
* {{ill|Fujiwara no Tsunetsugu|en|Fujiwara no Tsunetsugu|WD=Q5507547|lt=Fujiwara no Tsunatsugu}} – {{ill|Jūshii|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūshii|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} Lower, {{ill|Sangi (Japan)|en|Sangi (Japan)|WD=Q1133663|lt=Sangi}}
* Minabuchi no Hirozane (南淵弘貞) – {{ill|Jūsanmi|ja|従三位|1=Junior Third Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Third Rank|qq=}}, Councilor
* {{ill|Kiyohara no Natsuno|ja|清原夏野|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyohara no Natsuno|1=Kiyohara no Natsuno|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11560500}} – {{ill|Shōsanmi|ja|正三位|1=Senior Third Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Third Rank|qq=}}, {{ill|Minister of the Right|en|Minister of the Right|WD=Q1351174|lt=Udaijin}}
